utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: - health_coverage: Specifies costs (€315/month) and includes both physical and mental health insurance plus features; meets requirement. - property_coverage: Specifies costs (€95/month) and indicates home/contents coverage for Paris home and valuables; costs included; meets requirement. - travel_coverage: Specifies costs (€115/month) and coverage scope (EU/USA, unlimited medical, 24/7 assistance); meets requirement. - additional_services: Specifies costs (€290/month) and lists enhancement services; meets requirement. - total_budget: Provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown and savings; meets requirement. Therefore, all 5/5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items named in the final coverage plan and match them to identically named entries in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), LifeFirst Mental Health Standard (interpreted as LifeFirst Standard Plan under mental_health), Preventive Care Package (health enhancement), EliteHome Premium Coverage (home_content), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel_insurance), Premium Insurance Membership (general_services), Business Travel Support (travel_enhancement_services), and 24/7 Travel Assistance (travel_enhancement_services). Telemedicine services are mentioned but not as a separately priced item in the plan line; however, they exist in ground truth as Telemedicine Services enhancement but are not explicitly priced in the plan’s additional_services line, so only map items explicitly listed. Ratings are taken exactly from the ground truth.

final_package_text:

    "health_coverage": "€315/month - LifeFirst Standard Plan (€100), LifeFirst Mental Health Standard (€65), Preventive Care Package (€150) - includes 24/7 support, 5% deductibles, telemedicine services, integrated mental health care, and comprehensive annual checkups for all family members",
